title: Visible Traders
description: A mod that allows the player to view locked villager trades
body:
A mod that allows the player to view locked villager trades



*Version 0.0.1 has been removed due to worlds not being upgradable to 0.0.2 once used and several other issues* # Does this mod support trade cycling mods? Visible Traders currently only supports [Trade Cycling by henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling). If you want to see more compatible mods, reach out to the mod dev and see if they are interested in compat and have them contact Ramixin # The trades aren't generating on my Vanilla/Paper/Spigot/Bukkit server! Visible Traders is a mod that is requried on both the client and server in order to fuction. Since Vanilla, Paper, Spigot, Bukkit, and other servers do not support mods natively, the mod can not function in such environments. Please switch to a Fabric/NeoForge server # Does this work with modded villagers? --- Yes! This mod is fully compatible with all villager types. # What if I had villagers before I used this mod? Will it work? --- Yes again! This mod will make sure any villager existing before this mod is installed will display their trades as well. # What if I install the mod, and then remove it. What will happen? --- If removed, the locked trades that Visible Traders generates will also be removed to prevent villagers from instantly having all of their trades unlocked. ## License --- This project is under an MIT license
